description: High-level multi-tenant approach for consistent tenant isolation across backend, API, and clients.

strategy.model: Shared database, shared schema, tenant discriminator

resolution_order: Request header: X-Tenant-Id (fallback for internal/admin operations only)
Reject request if tenant cannot be resolved

isolation_rules: Every tenant-scoped query must filter by TenantId.
Every create operation must stamp TenantId from resolved tenant context.
Cross-tenant reads/writes are blocked by default.
Cross-tenant operations require an explicit privileged management flow and audit logging.
TenantId is immutable after record creation.

mobile: Do not expose tenant switch in customer/worker mobile flows.
web: Customer care and management sessions are tenant-scoped by default.
Any tenant override capability is future-gated and privileged-only.

signalr.rule: Pipeline updates and request events are only broadcast within the same tenant context.

non_goals_phase_0: No advanced tenant billing, limits, or feature flags enforcement.
